children.heading: Account
children.label: 1 Account
children.text: The term “account” means a demand deposit account or other similar transaction account at a depository institution.

children.heading: Board
children.label: 2 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.

children.heading: Business day
children.label: 3 Business day
children.text: The term “business day” means any day other than a Saturday, Sunday, or legal holiday.

children.heading: Cash
children.label: 4 Cash
children.text: The term “cash” means United States coins and currency, including Federal Reserve notes.

children.label: A
children.text: is drawn on a depository institution;

children.label: B
children.text: is signed by an officer or employee of such depository institution; and

children.label: C
children.text: is a direct obligation of such depository institution.

children.label: A
children.text: the signature on the check is genuine; and

children.label: i
children.text: are equal to the amount of the check; and

children.label: ii
children.text: will be used only to pay such check.

children.heading: Check
children.label: 7 Check
children.text: The term “check” means any negotiable demand draft drawn on or payable through an office of a depository institution located in the United States. Such term does not include noncash items.

children.heading: Check clearinghouse association
children.label: 8 Check clearinghouse association
children.text: The term “check clearinghouse association” means any arrangement by which participant depository institutions exchange deposited checks on a local basis, including an entire metropolitan area, without using the check processing facilities of the Federal Reserve System.

children.heading: Check processing region
children.label: 9 Check processing region
children.text: The term “check processing region” means the geographical area served by a Federal Reserve bank check processing center or such larger area as the Board may prescribe by regulations.

children.heading: Consumer account
children.label: 10 Consumer account
children.text: The term “consumer account” means any account used primarily for personal, family, or household purposes.

children.heading: Depository check
children.label: 11 Depository check
children.text: The term “depository check” means any cashier’s check, certified check, teller’s check, and any other functionally equivalent instrument as determined by the Board.

children.heading: Depository institution
children.label: 12 Depository institution
children.text: The term “depository institution” has the meaning given such term in clauses (i) through (vi) of . Such term also includes an office, branch, or agency of a foreign bank located in the United States.section 461(b)(1)(A) of this title

children.heading: Local originating depository institution
children.label: 13 Local originating depository institution
children.text: The term “local originating depository institution” means any originating depository institution which is located in the same check processing region as the receiving depository institution.

children.label: A
children.text: a check or other demand item to which a passbook, certificate, or other document is attached;

children.label: B
children.text: a check or other demand item which is accompanied by special instructions, such as a request for special advise of payment or dishonor; or

children.label: C
children.text: any similar item which is otherwise classified as a noncash item in regulations of the Board.

children.heading: Nonlocal originating depository institution
children.label: 15 Nonlocal originating depository institution
children.text: The term “nonlocal originating depository institution” means any originating depository institution which is not a local depository institution.

children.label: i
children.text: at or adjacent to a branch of the receiving depository institution; or

children.label: ii
children.text: in close proximity, as defined by the Board, to a branch of the receiving depository institution; or

children.label: B
children.text: owned by, operated exclusively for, or operated by the receiving depository institution.

children.heading: Originating depository institution
children.label: 17 Originating depository institution
children.text: The term “originating depository institution” means the branch of a depository institution on which a check is drawn.

children.heading: Nonproprietary ATM
children.label: 18 Nonproprietary ATM
children.text: The term “nonproprietary ATM” means an automated teller machine which is not a proprietary ATM.

children.label: A
children.text: is located in the same geographic area as that served by a check clearinghouse association; and

children.label: B
children.text: exchanges checks through the check clearinghouse association, either directly or through an intermediary.

children.heading: Receiving depository institution
children.label: 20 Receiving depository institution
children.text: The term “receiving depository institution” means the branch of a depository institution or the proprietary ATM, located in the United States, in which a check is first deposited.

children.heading: State
children.label: 21 State
children.text: The term “State” means any State, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, Guam, or the Virgin Islands.

children.heading: Teller’s check
children.label: 22 Teller’s check
children.text: The term “teller’s check” means any check issued by a depository institution and drawn on another depository institution.

children.heading: United States
children.label: 23 United States
children.text: The term “United States” means the several States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, Guam, and the Virgin Islands.

children.heading: Unit of general local government
children.label: 24 Unit of general local government
children.text: The term “unit of general local government” means any city, county, town, township, parish, village, or other general purpose political subdivision of a State.

children.heading: Wire transfer
children.label: 25 Wire transfer
children.text: The term “wire transfer” has such meaning as the Board shall prescribe by regulations.
